rulings.Case Title: FLORA TEO ET AL VS. HUNG KUO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 14, 2020 line 5. DEFENDANTS HUNG KUO AND WEI KUO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT continued to July 10, 2020 to be heard in department 302 at 9:30 a.m. per the order of the Presiding Judge. Parties to provide courtesy copies of all filings in support of and in opposition to the demurrer to Department 302 no later than July 2, 2020 with cover letters reflecting the new hearing date and department. = (501/CFH)
